original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: William, Emma, Grace, and Aria. William stated, "William is a knight and Aria is a knight". As Emma put it, "Grace is a knave". "If William is a knave then Aria is a knight," Grace mentioned. Aria was heard saying, "If Grace is a knight then William is a knave". So who is a knight and who is a knave?
